title: Man sentenced for Hyde Park killing; victim and defendant were ‘life-long close friends’
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News “The words from Jose Feliz’s family gives us motivation to work ever harder to reduce violence throughout our city,” the DA said.
A Hyde Park man was sentenced last week to 24 years in state prison for fatally shooting a “life-long” friend in 2024, prosecutors said.
